name.description: Action identifier; must match the file name (actions/<name>.yaml).

description.description: Human-readable summary of what the action does.

inputs.description: Declared inputs. Each value is a scalar default (null = required) or an explicit spec.

oneOf.description: Scalar shorthand: the default value (null means required).

default.description: Default value used when the caller omits this input.

required.description: Whether the caller must supply this input. Defaults to true when no default is given.

choices.description: Allowed values; a caller value outside this set is rejected.

type.description: Expected value type, validated before templating.

outputs.description: Named values (Jinja strings) published for later steps as steps['<id>'].outputs.<name>.

depends.description: Runtime dependencies contributed to the package.

makedepends.description: Build-time dependencies contributed to the package.

sources.description: PKGBUILD source() entries contributed by this action (Jinja strings).

pkgver.description: Bash body of the PKGBUILD pkgver() function (Jinja-templated).

prepare.description: Bash appended to the PKGBUILD prepare() function (Jinja-templated).

build.description: Bash appended to the PKGBUILD build() function (Jinja-templated).

package.description: Bash appended to the PKGBUILD package() function (Jinja-templated).
